description: This is a SPOT-5 (2.5 m resolution) satellite image from 2010-07-10, displaying an agricultural landscape near Guntershausen, Germany, using a 1/2/3 band combination. The image shows distinct land cover types, with large areas of what appears to be bare soil or recently tilled fields in reddish tones and vegetated fields in green. A specific linear feature, representing "lines of trees and scrub," is highlighted by a magenta outline. This feature exemplifies the EUNIS G5.1 class for early stages of woodland regrowth or newly-colonizing woodland in urban or agricultural areas. The image source is CNES 2010©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
